title: List of general presidencies of the Relief Society
displaytitle: List of general presidencies of the Relief Society

titles.normalized: List of general presidencies of the Relief Society
titles.display: List of general presidencies of the Relief Society

extract: This list of general presidencies of the Relief Society includes the general president and the counselors of the Relief Society General Presidency of the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
extract_html: This list of general presidencies of the Relief Society includes the general president and the counselors of the Relief Society General Presidency of the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
